scripts._ui:run: cross-env TEST_TYPE=ui npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project=uitest
scripts._api:run: cross-env TEST_TYPE=api npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project=apitest
scripts.test:systest: npm run apitest:systest && npm run uisystesttest
scripts.test:dev: npm run apitest && npm run uidevtest
scripts.test:ci: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=systest TEST_TYPE=api npx bddgen && cross-env ENVIRONMENT=systest TEST_TYPE=ui npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project=apitest && npx playwright test --project=uitest
